title: ActionDocsFrontendAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain action-docs-corpus-frontend AF3 retrospective to record that the dashboard surface serving the per-action documentation corpus (/docs/actions, /docs/actions/<surface>, /docs/actions/<surface>/<action>) has been verified against the chain's design doc and completion criteria. Self-hosting check parallel to SubstrateFrontendAuditCompleted — the frontend that consumes the events ledger uses that same ledger to record its own audit outcome. Findings are keyed to docs/ACTION_DOCS_FRONTEND.md sections and the chain's completion_condition items (a)–(e). See docs/ACTION_DOCS_FRONTEND.md and the chain's completion_condition for context.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the design / contract doc the findings are keyed against — docs/ACTION_DOCS_FRONTEND.md plus the chain's completion_condition items (a)–(e).

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome covering all completion-criterion sub-items (a)–(e).

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the follow-on work (e.g. orphan-from-the-other-side authoring of work.work_actions, the Qwen-mediated action_ask spike re-evaluation, or per-action analytics if usage patterns emerge). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per design-doc section or completion-criterion item. status uses the same enum as the architecture audit (pass / fail / partial / deferred).

item.description: Design-doc section identifier and short description (e.g. "§3 endpoint contract — GET /admin/action-docs").

status.description: pass = contract honored end-to-end; fail = gap (must file follow-on); partial = honored with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope per chain non-goals.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence: test names, file paths, commit SHA, curl output, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
